text:
when attempting to install virtual box using pkg_add -vr virtualbox-ose the download stops at this line.  

x share/doc/qt4/qch/qmake.qch
x share/doc/qt4/qch/qt.qchWaiting for final status

This happens repeatedly.  Before attempting this install I upgraded from 9.0-RC3 to 9.0-RELEASE

Fix:
